sections.title: If the player did not complete the 2024 Pride event

lines.speaker: Sir Kit Breaker
lines.text: Hello! The name's Kit. Sir Kit Breaker.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir Kit? That's a nice name!

lines.speaker: Sir Kit Breaker
lines.text: Thank you! I chose it myself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ... Thinking about it, I chose mine as well. I'm [player name], by the way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Sir Kit Breaker
lines.text: I'm helping Gilbert with a project of his, on behalf of the White knights. It will take us a while but I can let you know when we're closer to completion!

sections.title: If the player completed the 2024 Pride event

lines.speaker: Sir Kit Breaker
lines.text: [player name], it's good to see you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you getting on as a White Knight?

lines.speaker: Sir Kit Breaker
lines.text: It's going well, thank you. Being on loan to Gilbert and the Glade project is giving me good purpose whilst I do all the basic training.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Gilbert's not working you too hard is he?

lines.speaker: Sir Kit Breaker
lines.text: Not yet at least, until we get started on the land. For now it's mostly tending to the flowers and wandering... Patrolling around!

lines.speaker: Sir Kit Breaker
lines.text: I can't thank you enough, [player name]. I hope you'll pop by one day as the Glade project progresses. Don't be a stranger!
